title: platostoma longicorne
intro: Platostoma longicorne, also known as Long-horned Platostoma, is a species of plant in the mint family Lamiaceae, native to tropical Africa. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Platostoma longicorne include its ability to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, as well as its potential to help lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Platostoma longicorne can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
